texto: You should be able to strip a man naked and throw him out with nothing on him. By the end of the day, the man should be clothed and fed. By the end of the week, he should own a horse. And by the end of a year he should own a business and have money in the bank.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Rick Rescorla sobre temas ligados a negocios. A afirmação “You should be able to strip a man naked and throw him out with nothing on him. By the end of the …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a negocios, charity, society, útil em momentos de termino e society.
